data.name: Ray's Hotel Adventures
data.detailed_description:
WELCOME ABOARD!

Well we all know why you are here...To capture ghosts of course!
Come right through and enter the shoes of Ray, a rookie ghost hunter.
You'll be exploring a haunted hotel, capturing ghosts, and doing other FUN stuff.

MEET THE CHARACTERS

There has been news about a group of naughty Ghost Girls causing a havoc in an abandoned hotel. It is your job to clear the hotel of any ghosts and stop the Ghost Girls!

You play as Ray, a scaredy cat who just graduated from the Ghost Hunters Academy!
And it's time to get your first mission as an official Ghost Hunter.

This is BIG BOSS, CEO of the "Ghost Hunters".
He might seem small, but this isn't even his final form!

Don't let her cuteness fool you!
She is the leader of the "Ghost Girls", a very powerful ghost, and... well... a very horny one!

The Psycho of the Ghost Girls!
She might be petite, but are you sure you'll be able to handle her?

Known as the gardener, she is the most powerful ghost in the group.
She loves her plants, reading, and... HEY! STOP STARING AT HER BOOBS!


UNCOVER A HAUNTED HOTEL, FILLED WITH MYSTERY AND SECRETS!

Explore, solve puzzles, capture ghosts, and...HAVE SEX?!

Featuring

  • Find secrets and unlocks like classic games of the past!

  • 9 crazy floors to explore and exorcise

  • Fight unique and sexy boss girl battles!

  • Fully Interactive Sex Scenes to claim victory on those sexy ghosts!

  • Multiple poses, angles and fully voiced to help you reach your climax!

  • Arcade Minigames to keep your hands busy~

MAN OF CULTURE ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)

Just like every good game, this game contains Sexual Content!

Featuring

  • Multiple poses and locations

  • Free camera movement

  • First person mode ;)

  • Caressing

  • Outfits

  • Dynamic poses~

data.short_description: Use your handy Ghost Catcher to capture ghosts, solve puzzles, and stop the horny ghost girls that have been causing some trouble
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 烏克蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon RX 550
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-9600K or AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 Super / AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes

data.short_description: Use your handy Ghost Catcher to capture ghosts, solve puzzles, and stop the horny ghost girls that have been causing some trouble
data.supported_languages:
English*, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Ukrainian, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel i5-4590 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon RX 550
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-9600K or AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 Super / AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Yes
